---
title: "Lab: NSW + CPS Benchmark"
---

## Objective

Use `causaldata::nsw_mixtape` and `causaldata::cps_mixtape` to benchmark observational estimates against the NSW experimental reference.

## Design Setup

- Target estimand: `ATT` on NSW-treated units
- Observational comparison pool: CPS units
- Primary outcome: post-program earnings
- Key diagnostic focus: overlap and estimand drift under aggressive adjustment

## Planned Analysis Blocks

1. Construct combined analysis dataset with source indicator.
2. Compare raw observational estimate versus experimental benchmark.
3. Apply exact matching / CEM / entropy balancing.
4. Report balance, retention, ESS, and estimate movement.
5. Discuss when observational adjustment fails to recover benchmark effects.

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Add reproducible merge and preprocessing code.
- [ ] Define benchmark statistic and reporting table.
- [ ] Add overlap and weight diagnostics.
- [ ] Add final benchmark comparison narrative.
